user.title: Connect to Evertz Quartz Router
user.description: Enter the IP address and port of your Evertz EQX/EQT router or MAGNUM controller.

detect.title: Router Size
detect.description:
Connected to **{host}:{port}**.

The router was probed to auto-detect its size (auto-detected: {detected_sources} sources, {detected_destinations} destinations). You can override the values below, or paste a profile CSV export to populate them automatically.

data_description.max_sources: Number of sources in the Quartz profile
data_description.max_destinations: Number of destinations in the Quartz profile
data_description.levels: V = video. Append A, B, C… for audio. E.g. VABC routes video + 3 audio levels.
data_description.csv_profile: Paste the contents of your EQX/MAGNUM profile export here to auto-populate source and destination counts. Leave blank to use the values above. Supported: Evertz alias export, two-column CSV, or simply '32,32'.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect — check the IP address and port.
error.csv_parse_error: Could not parse the CSV. Check the format and try again — or leave it blank and set counts manually.

init.title: Evertz Quartz Router — Configure
init.description:
Router: **{host}**  ({current_size})

Max Sources and Levels apply immediately. Changing Max Destinations reloads the integration. {csv_format}

data_description.max_destinations: Changing this will reload the integration.
data_description.levels: V = video, A/B/C = audio. E.g. VABC routes video + first 3 audio levels.
data_description.verbose_logging: Log every raw TX/RX frame at DEBUG level.
data_description.reconnect_delay: Seconds to wait before reconnecting after a drop.
data_description.connect_timeout: Max seconds to establish the TCP connection.
data_description.csv_profile: Paste a profile CSV to update source/destination counts and names. Overwrites the Max Sources and Max Destinations fields above. Supported: Evertz alias export, two-column CSV, or shorthand like '32,32'.

route.name: Route Source to Destination
route.description: Routes a source to a destination on the Evertz router.

levels.name: Levels
levels.description: Optional level override (e.g. V, VA, VABC).
